# Nodaro.ai — Workflow JSON Specification for LLMs

> Nodaro.ai is a visual AI media production platform with a node-based workflow editor.
> This document describes the JSON format for programmatically generating workflows
> that can be imported into the system.

## Export/Import Format

```json
{
  "name": "My Workflow",
  "nodes": [ ...WorkflowNode[] ],
  "edges": [ ...WorkflowEdge[] ],
  "exportedAt": "2026-03-15T00:00:00.000Z",
  "version": "1.0"
}
```

## Node Structure

Every node is a React Flow node:

```json
{
  "id": "node_1",
  "type": "generate-image",
  "position": { "x": 200, "y": 100 },
  "data": { ...node-type-specific fields }
}
```

**ID convention:** Use `node_1`, `node_2`, etc. IDs are remapped on import.

**Position:** Arrange nodes left-to-right (inputs on left, outputs on right), spaced ~300px horizontally and ~200px vertically.

## Edge Structure

```json
{
  "id": "edge_1",
  "source": "node_1",
  "target": "node_2",
  "sourceHandle": "image",
  "targetHandle": "in"
}
```

- `sourceHandle`: The output port name of the source node (see Output Handles below).
- `targetHandle`: The input port name of the target node (see Input Handles below).
- Optional `data.outputMode`: `"each"` (fan-out per item), `"last"` (default), `"all"` (combine), `"item:N"` (specific index).

---

## Media Types

Nodes produce and consume four media types:

| Type | Description |
|------|-------------|
| `text` | Prompts, scripts, transcriptions |
| `image` | PNG, JPG, WEBP |
| `video` | MP4, WEBM, MOV |
| `audio` | MP3, WAV, OGG, FLAC |

Connections must be media-type compatible. A node that outputs `image` can connect to a node that accepts `image` input.

---

## Node Reference

### Input Nodes (0 credits)

#### text-prompt
Text input for prompts. Foundation of most workflows.

```json
{
  "type": "text-prompt",
  "data": {
    "label": "Text Prompt",
    "text": "A serene mountain landscape at golden hour"
  }
}
```

| Input Handles | Output Handles |
|---------------|----------------|
| `in` (text, optional) | `prompt` (text) |

#### list
Fan-out execution — runs downstream nodes once per item.

```json
{
  "type": "list",
  "data": {
    "label": "Scene List",
    "items": "A sunny beach\nA dark forest\nA snowy mountain",
    "fieldMappings": {}
  }
}
```

Items are newline-separated. Each line triggers a separate execution of connected nodes.

| Input Handles | Output Handles |
|---------------|----------------|
| `in` (text, optional) | `list` (text, fan-out) |

**Edge note:** Edges from list nodes default to `outputMode: "each"`.

#### upload-image
Reference to a user-uploaded image.

```json
{
  "type": "upload-image",
  "data": {
    "label": "Upload Image",
    "assetId": "",
    "url": ""
  }
}
```

| Input Handles | Output Handles |
|---------------|----------------|
| `in` (optional) | `image` (image) |

#### upload-video

```json
{
  "type": "upload-video",
  "data": {
    "label": "Upload Video",
    "assetId": "",
    "url": ""
  }
}
```

| Input Handles | Output Handles |
|---------------|----------------|
| `in` (optional) | `video` (video) |

#### upload-audio

```json
{
  "type": "upload-audio",
  "data": {
    "label": "Upload Audio",
    "assetId": "",
    "url": ""
  }
}
```

| Input Handles | Output Handles |
|---------------|----------------|
| `in` (optional) | `audio` (audio) |

#### youtube-video
Download video from YouTube URL.

```json
{
  "type": "youtube-video",
  "data": {
    "label": "Video URL",
    "youtubeUrl": "",
    "videoId": "",
    "title": "",
    "thumbnailUrl": ""
  }
}
```

| Input Handles | Output Handles |
|---------------|----------------|
| `in` (optional) | `video` (video) |

#### reference-audio
Extract audio from YouTube or uploaded file.

```json
{
  "type": "reference-audio",
  "data": {
    "label": "Reference Audio",
    "sourceType": "youtube",
    "youtubeUrl": "",
    "uploadedFileUrl": "",
    "directUrl": "",
    "videoTitle": "",
    "videoThumbnail": "",
    "videoDuration": "",
    "extractedAudioUrl": "",
    "extractionStatus": "idle"
  }
}
```

| Input Handles | Output Handles |
|---------------|----------------|
| `in` (optional) | `audio` (audio) |

#### rss-feed
Fetch content from an RSS feed.

```json
{
  "type": "rss-feed",
  "data": {
    "label": "RSS Feed",
    "feedUrl": "",
    "itemIndex": 0,
    "extractFields": ["title", "description"]
  }
}
```

| Input Handles | Output Handles |
|---------------|----------------|
| `in` (optional) | `content` (text) |

#### webhook-trigger
Receive external HTTP POST requests to trigger the workflow.

```json
{
  "type": "webhook-trigger",
  "data": {
    "label": "Webhook Trigger",
    "params": [
      { "id": "p1", "name": "prompt", "type": "string" }
    ]
  }
}
```

| Input Handles | Output Handles |
|---------------|----------------|
| none | `payload` (text) |

#### schedule-trigger
Run workflow on a cron schedule or interval.

```json
{
  "type": "schedule-trigger",
  "data": {
    "label": "Schedule Trigger",
    "cron": "0 9 * * *",
    "timezone": "America/New_York"
  }
}
```

Supports cron (5-field) or interval strings: `"5m"`, `"1h"`, `"1d"`.

| Input Handles | Output Handles |
|---------------|----------------|
| none | `payload` (text) |

---

### Parameter Nodes (0 credits)

These configure downstream AI nodes without generating content.

#### tone

```json
{ "type": "tone", "data": { "label": "Tone", "tone": "cinematic and dramatic" } }
```

| Handles | `in` -> `tone` |
|---------|---------------|

#### style-guide

```json
{ "type": "style-guide", "data": { "label": "Style Guide", "text": "Photorealistic, 8K, shallow depth of field" } }
```

| Handles | `in` -> `style_guide` |
|---------|----------------------|

#### aspect-ratio

```json
{ "type": "aspect-ratio", "data": { "label": "Aspect Ratio", "ratio": "16:9" } }
```

Values: `"1:1"`, `"16:9"`, `"9:16"`, `"4:3"`, `"4:5"`

| Handles | `in` -> `aspect_ratio` |
|---------|-----------------------|

#### duration

```json
{ "type": "duration", "data": { "label": "Duration", "seconds": 60 } }
```

| Handles | `in` -> `duration` |
|---------|--------------------|

#### scene-count

```json
{ "type": "scene-count", "data": { "label": "Scene Count", "count": 5 } }
```

| Handles | `in` -> `scene_count` |
|---------|----------------------|

#### motion

```json
{ "type": "motion", "data": { "label": "Motion", "motion": "moderate" } }
```

Values: `"subtle"`, `"moderate"`, `"dynamic"`

| Handles | `in` -> `out` |
|---------|---------------|

#### camera-motion

```json
{ "type": "camera-motion", "data": { "label": "Camera Motion", "cameraMotion": "zoom-in" } }
```

Values: `"static"`, `"pan-left"`, `"pan-right"`, `"zoom-in"`, `"zoom-out"`

| Handles | `in` -> `out` |
|---------|---------------|

---

### AI Generation Nodes

#### generate-image (5 credits)
Generate an image from a text prompt.

```json
{
  "type": "generate-image",
  "data": {
    "label": "Generate Image",
    "prompt": "A futuristic cityscape at night with neon lights",
    "provider": "nano-banana-pro",
    "style": "cinematic",
    "aspectRatio": "16:9",
    "negativePrompt": "",
    "fieldMappings": {}
  }
}
```

**Providers:** `nano-banana`, `nano-banana-pro`, `grok`, `flux`, `flux-flex`, `gpt-image`, `imagen4`, `imagen4-fast`, `imagen4-ultra`, `ideogram-v3`, `qwen`, `seedream`, `seedream-5-lite`, `nano-banana-2`, `flux-kontext`, `flux-kontext-max`, `z-image`

**Aspect ratios by provider:**
- Most: `1:1`, `16:9`, `9:16`, `4:3`, `3:4`, `3:2`, `2:3`
- GPT Image: `1:1`, `3:2`, `2:3` only
- Flux Kontext: `1:1`, `16:9`, `9:16`, `4:3`, `3:4`, `21:9`

**Optional fields:**
- `resolution`: `"1K"`, `"2K"`, `"4K"` (nano-banana-pro, nano-banana-2, flux, flux-flex)
- `quality`: `"medium"`, `"high"` (gpt-image); `"basic"`, `"high"` (seedream)
- `seed`: number (for reproducibility)

**Style presets:** `"cinematic"`, `"anime"`, `"photorealistic"`, `"oil-painting"`, `"watercolor"`, `"digital-art"`, `"3d-render"`, `"pixel-art"`, `"comic-book"`, `"sketch"`, `"fantasy"`, `"noir"`, `"pop-art"`, `"minimalist"`, `"vintage"`, `"surreal"`, or custom text.

| Input Handles | Output Handles |
|---------------|----------------|
| `in` (text/image) | `image` (image) |

When an image node connects to `generate-image`, it adds a reference image (supported by: `nano-banana`, `nano-banana-pro`, `ideogram-v3`).

#### edit-image (3 credits)
Transform or upscale an existing image.

```json
{
  "type": "edit-image",
  "data": {
    "label": "Edit Image",
    "prompt": "Remove the background",
    "provider": "recraft-remove-bg",
    "fieldMappings": {}
  }
}
```

**Providers:** `recraft-upscale`, `topaz-image-upscale`, `recraft-remove-bg`, `nano-banana-edit`

**Optional fields:**
- `upscaleFactor`: `"2"`, `"4"` (recraft-upscale)
- `targetResolution`: `"2K"`, `"4K"`, `"8K"` (topaz-image-upscale)

| Input Handles | Output Handles |
|---------------|----------------|
| `image` (image) | `out` (image) |

#### image-to-image (5 credits)
Transform an image with AI guided by a prompt.

```json
{
  "type": "image-to-image",
  "data": {
    "label": "Image to Image",
    "prompt": "Make it look like a watercolor painting",
    "provider": "flux-kontext",
    "fieldMappings": {}
  }
}
```

**Providers:** `nano-banana`, `nano-banana-pro`, `grok-i2i`, `flux-i2i`, `flux-pro-i2i`, `gpt-image-i2i`, `ideogram-edit`, `ideogram-remix`, `ideogram-reframe`, `qwen-i2i`, `qwen-edit`, `seedream-edit`, `seedream-5-lite-i2i`, `flux-kontext`, `flux-kontext-max`

**Optional fields:** `strength` (0-1), `aspectRatio`, `negativePrompt`, `seed`, `guidanceScale`

| Input Handles | Output Handles |
|---------------|----------------|
| `image` (image) | `out` (image) |

#### generate-script (2 credits)
Generate a multi-scene script from a prompt.

```json
{
  "type": "generate-script",
  "data": {
    "label": "Generate Script",
    "provider": "gemini",
    "model": "gemini-2.5-flash",
    "sceneCount": 5,
    "styleGuide": "",
    "structure": "freeform",
    "tone": "",
    "targetLength": 60,
    "fieldMappings": {}
  }
}
```

**Providers:** `gemini`, `claude`, `openai`

| Input Handles | Output Handles |
|---------------|----------------|
| `in` (text) | `scenes` (structured scene data) |

#### text-to-video (25 credits)
Generate video from text prompt.

```json
{
  "type": "text-to-video",
  "data": {
    "label": "Text to Video",
    "prompt": "A drone shot flying over a tropical coastline at sunset",
    "provider": "minimax",
    "duration": 5,
    "aspectRatio": "16:9",
    "negativePrompt": "",
    "fieldMappings": {}
  }
}
```

**Providers & durations:**
- `minimax` (5s), `veo3` (8s), `kling` (5-10s), `kling-turbo` (5-10s), `kling-3.0` (3-15s)
- `grok` (6-10s), `sora2-pro` (5-10s), `sora2` (5-10s), `seedance` (4-12s)
- `wan` (5-15s), `wan-turbo` (5s), `hailuo-standard` (6-10s)
- `bytedance-lite` (5-10s), `bytedance-pro` (5-10s), `runway-kie` (5-10s)

| Input Handles | Output Handles |
|---------------|----------------|
| `in` (text) | `video` (video) |

#### image-to-video (20 credits)
Animate an image into video.

```json
{
  "type": "image-to-video",
  "data": {
    "label": "Image to Video",
    "provider": "veo3",
    "duration": 5,
    "motion": "moderate",
    "cameraMotion": "static",
    "prompt": "Gentle breeze moves the leaves",
    "fieldMappings": {}
  }
}
```

**Providers:** `minimax`, `veo3`, `veo3.1`, `kling`, `kling-turbo`, `kling-3.0`, `kling-master`, `seedance`, `hailuo-2.3-pro`, `hailuo-2.3`, `hailuo-standard`, `sora2-pro`, `sora2`, `wan-i2v`, `wan-turbo`, `bytedance-lite`, `bytedance-pro`, `bytedance-pro-fast`, `grok-i2v`, `runway-kie`

**Optional fields:**
- `generateAudio`: boolean (veo3, veo3.1 only)
- `aspectRatio`: `"16:9"`, `"9:16"`, `"1:1"`, `"21:9"`
- `removeWatermark`: boolean (sora2, sora2-pro)

| Input Handles | Output Handles |
|---------------|----------------|
| `startFrame` (image), `endFrame` (image, optional), `audio` (audio, optional) | `video` (video) |

**End frame support (2-image to video):** `minimax`, `veo3`, `veo3.1`, `kling-turbo`, `kling-3.0`, `hailuo-standard`, `bytedance-lite`

#### video-to-video (25 credits)
Transform existing video with AI.

```json
{
  "type": "video-to-video",
  "data": {
    "label": "Video to Video",
    "prompt": "Convert to anime style",
    "duration": 5,
    "fieldMappings": {}
  }
}
```

**Providers:** `wan` (default), `luma-modify`, `runway-aleph`

| Input Handles | Output Handles |
|---------------|----------------|
| `in` (video) | `video` (video) |

#### text-to-speech (3 credits)
Convert text to spoken audio.

```json
{
  "type": "text-to-speech",
  "data": {
    "label": "Text to Speech",
    "provider": "elevenlabs-v3",
    "voiceId": "Rachel",
    "voiceType": "premade",
    "voiceDisplayName": "Rachel",
    "language": "en",
    "speed": 1,
    "stability": 0.5,
    "similarityBoost": 0.75,
    "style": 0,
    "languageCode": "",
    "textSource": "connected",
    "directText": "",
    "fieldMappings": {}
  }
}
```

**Providers:** `elevenlabs-v3` (default, supports audio tags), `elevenlabs-v2`, `elevenlabs-turbo`

**Common voice IDs:** `"Rachel"`, `"Clyde"`, `"Dave"`, `"Fin"`, `"Sarah"`, `"Antoni"`, `"Thomas"`, `"Charlie"`, `"George"`, `"Emily"`, `"Elli"`, `"Callum"`, `"Patrick"`, `"Harry"`, `"Liam"`, `"Dorothy"`, `"Josh"`, `"Arnold"`, `"Charlotte"`, `"Matilda"`, `"Jessica"`, `"Michael"`, `"Ethan"`, `"Gigi"`, `"Freya"`, `"Grace"`, `"Daniel"`, `"Lily"`, `"Serena"`, `"Adam"`, `"Nicole"`, `"Bill"`, `"Sam"`, `"Glinda"`, `"Giovanni"`, `"Mimi"`, `"Brian"`, `"Chris"`, `"James"`, `"Joseph"`, `"Drew"`, `"Paul"`, `"Aria"`, `"Roger"`, `"Eric"`, `"Valentino"`, `"Alice"`, `"Joanne"`, `"Laura"`, `"Will"`, `"Andrea"`, `"River"`

**textSource options:**
- `"connected"`: Uses text from upstream connected node
- `"direct"`: Uses the `directText` field

| Input Handles | Output Handles |
|---------------|----------------|
| `in` (text) | `audio` (audio) |

#### generate-music (5 credits)
Generate music from a prompt.

```json
{
  "type": "generate-music",
  "data": {
    "label": "Generate Music",
    "prompt": "Epic orchestral trailer music with building intensity",
    "provider": "suno",
    "duration": 8,
    "genre": "",
    "mood": "",
    "instrumental": true,
    "lyrics": "",
    "referenceAudioUrl": "",
    "referenceYouTubeUrl": "",
    "referenceSource": "none",
    "modelVersion": "stereo-large",
    "fieldMappings": {}
  }
}
```

| Input Handles | Output Handles |
|---------------|----------------|
| `in` (text) | `audio` (audio) |

#### text-to-audio (3 credits)
Generate sound effects from a text description.

```json
{
  "type": "text-to-audio",
  "data": {
    "label": "Text to Audio",
    "prompt": "Thunder rumbling in the distance",
    "provider": "elevenlabs-sfx",
    "duration": 10,
    "fieldMappings": {}
  }
}
```

| Input Handles | Output Handles |
|---------------|----------------|
| `in` (text) | `audio` (audio) |

#### ai-writer (2 credits)
AI text generation with custom system prompts.

```json
{
  "type": "ai-writer",
  "data": {
    "label": "AI Writer",
    "templateId": "",
    "systemPrompt": "You are a creative screenwriter.",
    "userInput": "",
    "provider": "claude",
    "model": "claude-sonnet-4-6",
    "temperature": 0.7,
    "maxTokens": 2000,
    "fieldMappings": {}
  }
}
```

**Providers:** `claude`, `gemini`, `openai`

| Input Handles | Output Handles |
|---------------|----------------|
| `in` (text) | `text` (text) |

#### transcribe (3 credits)
Transcribe audio to text.

```json
{
  "type": "transcribe",
  "data": {
    "label": "Transcribe",
    "provider": "elevenlabs-stt",
    "language": "auto",
    "fieldMappings": {}
  }
}
```

**Optional:** `diarize: true` (speaker detection), `tagAudioEvents: true`

| Input Handles | Output Handles |
|---------------|----------------|
| `in` (audio) | `text` (text) |

#### image-to-text (1 credit)
Describe an image with AI.

```json
{
  "type": "image-to-text",
  "data": {
    "label": "Describe Image",
    "detailLevel": "detailed",
    "customPrompt": "",
    "fieldMappings": {}
  }
}
```

**detailLevel:** `"brief"`, `"detailed"`, `"structured"`

| Input Handles | Output Handles |
|---------------|----------------|
| `image` (image) | `text` (text) |

#### lip-sync (40 credits)
Animate a face to match audio.

```json
{
  "type": "lip-sync",
  "data": {
    "label": "Lip Sync",
    "provider": "kling-avatar",
    "resolution": "720p",
    "prompt": "",
    "fieldMappings": {}
  }
}
```

**Providers:** `kling-avatar`, `infinitalk`, `infinitalk-pro`

| Input Handles | Output Handles |
|---------------|----------------|
| `image` (image), `audio` (audio) | `video` (video) |

#### text-to-dialogue (4 credits)
Multi-speaker dialogue generation.

```json
{
  "type": "text-to-dialogue",
  "data": {
    "label": "Text to Dialogue",
    "dialogue": [
      { "id": "1", "text": "Hello, how are you?", "voice": "Sarah" },
      { "id": "2", "text": "I'm great, thanks!", "voice": "Dave" }
    ],
    "stability": 0.5,
    "languageCode": "",
    "fieldMappings": {}
  }
}
```

| Input Handles | Output Handles |
|---------------|----------------|
| `in` (text, optional) | `audio` (audio) |

#### audio-isolation (1 credit)
Extract voice from audio, removing background noise.

```json
{
  "type": "audio-isolation",
  "data": {
    "label": "Voice Extractor",
    "fieldMappings": {}
  }
}
```

| Input Handles | Output Handles |
|---------------|----------------|
| `in` (audio) | `audio` (audio) |

#### voice-changer (4 credits)
Change the voice in audio while preserving emotion/delivery.

```json
{
  "type": "voice-changer",
  "data": {
    "label": "Voice Changer",
    "voiceId": "Rachel",
    "voiceLabel": "Rachel",
    "voiceType": "premade",
    "stability": 0.5,
    "similarityBoost": 0.75,
    "removeBackgroundNoise": false,
    "fieldMappings": {}
  }
}
```

| Input Handles | Output Handles |
|---------------|----------------|
| `in` (audio) | `audio` (audio) |

#### dubbing (8 credits)
Translate audio to another language preserving speaker identity.

```json
{
  "type": "dubbing",
  "data": {
    "label": "Dubbing",
    "targetLanguage": "es",
    "fieldMappings": {}
  }
}
```

**Languages:** ISO codes (`"es"`, `"fr"`, `"de"`, `"ja"`, `"ko"`, `"zh"`, `"pt"`, `"it"`, `"ru"`, `"ar"`, `"hi"`, `"tr"`, `"pl"`, `"nl"`, `"sv"`, etc.)

| Input Handles | Output Handles |
|---------------|----------------|
| `in` (audio) | `audio` (audio) |

#### voice-remix (4 credits)
Generate audio with a voice described in natural language.

```json
{
  "type": "voice-remix",
  "data": {
    "label": "Voice Remix",
    "text": "Hello, this is a test.",
    "voiceDescription": "A warm female voice with a slight British accent",
    "fieldMappings": {}
  }
}
```

| Input Handles | Output Handles |
|---------------|----------------|
| `in` (text, optional) | `audio` (audio) |

#### voice-design (5 credits)
Design a custom voice with fine-grained controls.

```json
{
  "type": "voice-design",
  "data": {
    "label": "Voice Design",
    "text": "Hello, this is a test.",
    "voiceDescription": "Young male, energetic",
    "fieldMappings": {}
  }
}
```

| Input Handles | Output Handles |
|---------------|----------------|
| `in` (text, optional) | `audio` (audio), `voiceId` (text) |

#### forced-alignment (3 credits)
Get word-level timestamps from audio + transcript.

```json
{
  "type": "forced-alignment",
  "data": {
    "label": "Forced Alignment",
    "transcript": "",
    "fieldMappings": {}
  }
}
```

| Input Handles | Output Handles |
|---------------|----------------|
| `in` (audio) | `data` (JSON) |

#### extend-video (40 credits)
Extend an existing AI-generated video.

```json
{
  "type": "extend-video",
  "data": {
    "label": "Extend Video",
    "provider": "veo-extend",
    "prompt": "Continue the scene with...",
    "fieldMappings": {}
  }
}
```

**Providers:** `veo-extend`, `runway-extend`

| Input Handles | Output Handles |
|---------------|----------------|
| `in` (video) | `video` (video) |

#### video-upscale (15 credits)
Upscale video resolution.

```json
{
  "type": "video-upscale",
  "data": {
    "label": "Video Upscale",
    "provider": "topaz",
    "upscaleFactor": "2",
    "fieldMappings": {}
  }
}
```

**Providers:** `topaz`, `topaz-4k`, `topaz-8k`, `veo-1080p`, `veo-4k`

| Input Handles | Output Handles |
|---------------|----------------|
| `in` (video) | `video` (video) |

#### motion-transfer (30 credits)
Transfer motion from a video to a character image.

```json
{
  "type": "motion-transfer",
  "data": {
    "label": "Motion Transfer",
    "prompt": "",
    "characterOrientation": "video",
    "resolution": "720p",
    "fieldMappings": {}
  }
}
```

**Providers:** `kling`, `kling-3.0`, `wan-animate-move`, `wan-animate-replace`

| Input Handles | Output Handles |
|---------------|----------------|
| `image` (image), `video` (video) | `out` (video) |

#### speech-to-video (4 credits)
Generate a talking head video from image + audio.

```json
{
  "type": "speech-to-video",
  "data": {
    "label": "Speech to Video",
    "prompt": "A person speaking naturally",
    "resolution": "480p",
    "fieldMappings": {}
  }
}
```

| Input Handles | Output Handles |
|---------------|----------------|
| `image` (image), `audio` (audio), `prompt` (text, optional) | `video` (video) |

#### sora-storyboard (47 credits)
Multi-shot video generation with Sora 2 Pro.

```json
{
  "type": "sora-storyboard",
  "data": {
    "label": "Sora Storyboard",
    "shots": [
      { "scene": "A woman walks through a forest", "duration": 5 },
      { "scene": "She discovers a hidden temple", "duration": 5 }
    ],
    "nFrames": "10",
    "aspectRatio": "landscape",
    "fieldMappings": {}
  }
}
```

| Input Handles | Output Handles |
|---------------|----------------|
| `image` (image, optional) | `video` (video) |

#### qa-check (1 credit)
AI quality check on media.

```json
{
  "type": "qa-check",
  "data": {
    "label": "QA Check",
    "provider": "claude",
    "checkType": "quality",
    "threshold": 0.8,
    "fieldMappings": {}
  }
}
```

| Input Handles | Output Handles |
|---------------|----------------|
| `in` (any) | `approved` (passthrough), `rejected` (passthrough) |

---

### Suno Music Nodes

#### suno-generate (3 credits)

```json
{
  "type": "suno-generate",
  "data": {
    "label": "Suno Generate",
    "prompt": "An upbeat pop song about summer",
    "model": "V5",
    "lyrics": "",
    "style": "",
    "title": "",
    "negativeStyle": "",
    "fieldMappings": {}
  }
}
```

| Input Handles | Output Handles |
|---------------|----------------|
| `in` (text) | `audio` (audio) |

#### suno-cover (3 credits)

```json
{
  "type": "suno-cover",
  "data": {
    "label": "Suno Cover",
    "prompt": "",
    "model": "V5",
    "uploadUrl": "",
    "lyrics": "",
    "style": "jazz",
    "title": "",
    "negativeStyle": "",
    "fieldMappings": {}
  }
}
```

| Input Handles | Output Handles |
|---------------|----------------|
| `in` (audio) | `audio` (audio) |

#### suno-extend (3 credits)

```json
{
  "type": "suno-extend",
  "data": {
    "label": "Suno Extend",
    "audioId": "",
    "defaultParamFlag": true,
    "prompt": "",
    "model": "V5",
    "style": "",
    "title": "",
    "continueAt": 0,
    "negativeStyle": "",
    "fieldMappings": {}
  }
}
```

| Input Handles | Output Handles |
|---------------|----------------|
| `in` (audio) | `audio` (audio) |

#### suno-lyrics (1 credit)
Generate lyrics from a prompt.

```json
{
  "type": "suno-lyrics",
  "data": { "label": "Suno Lyrics", "prompt": "Write lyrics about the ocean", "fieldMappings": {} }
}
```

| Input Handles | Output Handles |
|---------------|----------------|
| `in` (text) | `text` (text) |

#### suno-separate (2 credits)
Separate vocals from instrumentals.

```json
{
  "type": "suno-separate",
  "data": { "label": "Suno Separate", "type": "separate_vocal", "taskId": "", "audioId": "", "fieldMappings": {} }
}
```

| Input Handles | Output Handles |
|---------------|----------------|
| `audio` (audio) | `audio` (audio) |

#### suno-mashup (4 credits)

```json
{
  "type": "suno-mashup",
  "data": {
    "label": "Suno Mashup",
    "model": "V5",
    "customMode": false,
    "style": "",
    "title": "",
    "negativeStyle": "",
    "vocalGender": "",
    "fieldMappings": {}
  }
}
```

| Input Handles | Output Handles |
|---------------|----------------|
| `audio1` (audio), `audio2` (audio) | `audio` (audio) |

#### suno-replace-section (2 credits)

```json
{
  "type": "suno-replace-section",
  "data": {
    "label": "Suno Replace Section",
    "infillStartS": 0,
    "infillEndS": 30,
    "prompt": "",
    "tags": "",
    "title": "",
    "fieldMappings": {}
  }
}
```

| Input Handles | Output Handles |
|---------------|----------------|
| `audio` (audio) | `audio` (audio) |

#### suno-music-video (1 credit)

```json
{
  "type": "suno-music-video",
  "data": { "label": "Suno Music Video", "taskId": "", "audioId": "", "fieldMappings": {} }
}
```

| Input Handles | Output Handles |
|---------------|----------------|
| `audio` (audio) | `video` (video) |

#### suno-style-boost (1 credit)

```json
{ "type": "suno-style-boost", "data": { "label": "Suno Style Boost", "content": "", "fieldMappings": {} } }
```

| Input Handles | Output Handles |
|---------------|----------------|
| `text` (text) | `text` (text) |

#### suno-add-instrumental (4 credits)

```json
{ "type": "suno-add-instrumental", "data": { "label": "Suno Add Instrumental", "model": "V5", "fieldMappings": {} } }
```

| Input Handles | Output Handles |
|---------------|----------------|
| `audio` (audio) | `audio` (audio) |

#### suno-add-vocals (4 credits)

```json
{ "type": "suno-add-vocals", "data": { "label": "Suno Add Vocals", "model": "V5", "fieldMappings": {} } }
```

| Input Handles | Output Handles |
|---------------|----------------|
| `audio` (audio) | `audio` (audio) |

#### suno-convert-wav (1 credit)

```json
{ "type": "suno-convert-wav", "data": { "label": "Suno Convert WAV", "fieldMappings": {} } }
```

| Input Handles | Output Handles |
|---------------|----------------|
| `audio` (audio) | `audio` (audio) |

#### suno-upload-extend (4 credits)

```json
{
  "type": "suno-upload-extend",
  "data": {
    "label": "Suno Upload Extend",
    "prompt": "",
    "model": "V5",
    "style": "",
    "title": "",
    "negativeStyle": "",
    "vocalGender": "",
    "continueAt": 0,
    "defaultParamFlag": true,
    "fieldMappings": {}
  }
}
```

| Input Handles | Output Handles |
|---------------|----------------|
| `audio` (audio) | `audio` (audio) |

---

### Processing Nodes

#### combine-videos (2 credits)
Concatenate multiple videos with transitions.

```json
{
  "type": "combine-videos",
  "data": {
    "label": "Combine Videos",
    "transition": "fade",
    "transitionDuration": 0.5,
    "audioMode": "crossfade",
    "fieldMappings": {}
  }
}
```

**Transitions:** `"cut"`, `"fade"`, `"dissolve"`, `"dip-to-black"`, `"dip-to-white"`
**Audio modes:** `"keep"`, `"crossfade"`, `"remove"`

Connect multiple video sources to the single `in` handle.

| Input Handles | Output Handles |
|---------------|----------------|
| `in` (video, accepts multiple) | `video` (video) |

#### merge-video-audio (1 credit)
Merge video with one or more audio tracks.

```json
{
  "type": "merge-video-audio",
  "data": {
    "label": "Merge Video & Audio",
    "audioType": "voiceover",
    "voiceoverVolume": 100,
    "backgroundVolume": 30,
    "keepOriginalAudio": true,
    "originalAudioVolume": 30,
    "originalAudioRole": "background",
    "trackSettings": {},
    "fieldMappings": {}
  }
}
```

Connect one video and one or more audio sources to `in`.

| Input Handles | Output Handles |
|---------------|----------------|
| `in` (video + audio, accepts multiple) | `video` (video) |

#### add-captions (2 credits)
Add subtitles/captions to a video.

```json
{
  "type": "add-captions",
  "data": {
    "label": "Add Captions",
    "style": "word-highlight",
    "position": "bottom",
    "fontSize": 24,
    "color": "#ffffff",
    "fieldMappings": {}
  }
}
```

**Styles:** `"subtitle"`, `"word-highlight"`, `"karaoke"`

| Input Handles | Output Handles |
|---------------|----------------|
| `in` (video) | `video` (video) |

#### resize-video (1 credit)
Resize video to a different aspect ratio.

```json
{
  "type": "resize-video",
  "data": {
    "label": "Resize Video",
    "targetAspect": "9:16",
    "method": "crop",
    "padColor": "#000000",
    "fieldMappings": {}
  }
}
```

**Methods:** `"crop"`, `"pad"`, `"stretch"`

| Input Handles | Output Handles |
|---------------|----------------|
| `in` (video) | `video` (video) |

#### extract-audio (1 credit)

```json
{
  "type": "extract-audio",
  "data": {
    "label": "Extract Audio",
    "outputSilentVideo": true,
    "audioFormat": "mp3",
    "fieldMappings": {}
  }
}
```

| Input Handles | Output Handles |
|---------------|----------------|
| `in` (video) | `audio` (audio), `silent-video` (video) |

#### mix-audio (1 credit)
Mix multiple audio tracks together.

```json
{
  "type": "mix-audio",
  "data": {
    "label": "Mix Audio",
    "trackCount": 2,
    "trackVolumes": {},
    "fieldMappings": {}
  }
}
```

Connect multiple audio sources to the single `in` handle.

| Input Handles | Output Handles |
|---------------|----------------|
| `in` (audio, accepts multiple) | `audio` (audio) |

#### adjust-volume (0 credits)

```json
{
  "type": "adjust-volume",
  "data": {
    "label": "Adjust Volume",
    "volume": 100,
    "normalize": false,
    "fadeIn": 0,
    "fadeOut": 0,
    "fieldMappings": {}
  }
}
```

| Input Handles | Output Handles |
|---------------|----------------|
| `in` (audio or video) | `audio` (audio) |

#### trim-video (0 credits)

```json
{
  "type": "trim-video",
  "data": {
    "label": "Trim Video",
    "startTime": 0,
    "endTime": 10,
    "fieldMappings": {}
  }
}
```

| Input Handles | Output Handles |
|---------------|----------------|
| `in` (video) | `video` (video) |

#### speed-ramp (0 credits)

```json
{
  "type": "speed-ramp",
  "data": {
    "label": "Adjust Speed",
    "speed": 1.5,
    "adjustAudio": true,
    "fieldMappings": {}
  }
}
```

| Input Handles | Output Handles |
|---------------|----------------|
| `in` (video) | `video` (video) |

#### loop-video (0 credits)

```json
{
  "type": "loop-video",
  "data": {
    "label": "Loop Video",
    "mode": "repeat",
    "repeatCount": 3,
    "targetDuration": 10,
    "fieldMappings": {}
  }
}
```

**Modes:** `"repeat"` (N times), `"duration"` (target seconds)

| Input Handles | Output Handles |
|---------------|----------------|
| `in` (video) | `video` (video) |

#### fade-video (0 credits)

```json
{
  "type": "fade-video",
  "data": {
    "label": "Fade In/Out",
    "fadeIn": true,
    "fadeInDuration": 0.5,
    "fadeOut": true,
    "fadeOutDuration": 0.5,
    "color": "black",
    "fieldMappings": {}
  }
}
```

| Input Handles | Output Handles |
|---------------|----------------|
| `in` (video) | `video` (video) |

#### transcode-video (0 credits)

```json
{
  "type": "transcode-video",
  "data": {
    "label": "Transcode Video",
    "codec": "h264",
    "crf": 23,
    "resolution": "1080p",
    "audioBitrate": "192k",
    "fieldMappings": {}
  }
}
```

| Input Handles | Output Handles |
|---------------|----------------|
| `in` (video) | `video` (video) |

#### social-media-format (0 credits)
Format media for social platform specs.

```json
{
  "type": "social-media-format",
  "data": {
    "label": "Social Media Format",
    "platform": "instagram",
    "contentType": "feed-square",
    "specKey": "instagram:feed-square",
    "method": "pad",
    "padColor": "#000000",
    "formattedText": "",
    "fieldMappings": {}
  }
}
```

| Input Handles | Output Handles |
|---------------|----------------|
| `media` (image/video), `text` (text) | `media` (image/video), `text` (text) |

---

### Composition Nodes

These nodes create video compositions rendered by the `render-video` node.

#### video-composer (2 credits)
AI-powered video composition from natural language.

```json
{
  "type": "video-composer",
  "data": {
    "label": "Compose Video",
    "compositionPrompt": "Create a slideshow with all images, each for 3 seconds with fade transitions",
    "fps": 30,
    "aspectRatio": "16:9",
    "durationSeconds": 30,
    "backgroundColor": "#000000",
    "fieldMappings": {}
  }
}
```

| Input Handles | Output Handles |
|---------------|----------------|
| `in` (images/videos/audio) | `composition` (plan) |

#### after-effects (2 credits)
AI-generated post-processing effects on video.

```json
{
  "type": "after-effects",
  "data": {
    "label": "After Effects",
    "effectPrompt": "Add a cinematic color grade with vignette and subtle film grain",
    "fps": 30,
    "durationSeconds": 10,
    "fieldMappings": {}
  }
}
```

| Input Handles | Output Handles |
|---------------|----------------|
| `in` (video) | `composition` (plan) |

#### motion-graphics (2 credits)
AI-generated 2D motion graphics.

```json
{
  "type": "motion-graphics",
  "data": {
    "label": "Motion Graphics",
    "motionPrompt": "Animated lower third with company name and title",
    "aspectRatio": "16:9",
    "backgroundColor": "#00000000",
    "fps": 30,
    "durationSeconds": 5,
    "fieldMappings": {}
  }
}
```

| Input Handles | Output Handles |
|---------------|----------------|
| `in` (optional) | `composition` (plan) |

#### 3d-title (3 credits)
AI-generated animated 3D text scenes.

```json
{
  "type": "3d-title",
  "data": {
    "label": "3D Title",
    "titlePrompt": "Epic golden 3D text saying ADVENTURE with particle effects",
    "aspectRatio": "16:9",
    "backgroundColor": "#000000",
    "fps": 30,
    "durationSeconds": 10,
    "fieldMappings": {}
  }
}
```

| Input Handles | Output Handles |
|---------------|----------------|
| `background` (image/video, optional) | `composition` (plan) |

#### composite (0 credits)
Multi-layer video compositor (PiP, split screen, overlays).

```json
{
  "type": "composite",
  "data": {
    "label": "Composite",
    "layers": [],
    "fps": 30,
    "aspectRatio": "16:9",
    "durationSeconds": 10,
    "backgroundColor": "#000000"
  }
}
```

| Input Handles | Output Handles |
|---------------|----------------|
| `video1`, `video2`, `video3`, `video4` (video) | `composition` (plan) |

#### render-video (3 credits)
Renders a composition plan into a final video file.

```json
{
  "type": "render-video",
  "data": {
    "label": "Render Video",
    "fps": 30,
    "aspectRatio": "16:9",
    "durationSeconds": 30,
    "backgroundColor": "#000000",
    "fieldMappings": {}
  }
}
```

**Must be connected downstream of a composition node** (video-composer, after-effects, motion-graphics, 3d-title, or composite).

| Input Handles | Output Handles |
|---------------|----------------|
| `in` (composition plan) | `video` (video) |

---

### Utility Nodes

#### combine-text (0 credits)
Concatenate multiple text inputs.

```json
{
  "type": "combine-text",
  "data": {
    "label": "Combine Text",
    "separator": "newline",
    "customSeparator": "",
    "combinedText": ""
  }
}
```

**Separators:** `"newline"`, `"comma"`, `"space"`, `"double-newline"`, `"custom"`

| Input Handles | Output Handles |
|---------------|----------------|
| `in` (text, accepts multiple) | `text` (text) |

#### split-text (0 credits)
Split text into items.

```json
{
  "type": "split-text",
  "data": {
    "label": "Split Text",
    "separator": "\\n",
    "trimWhitespace": true,
    "removeEmpty": true
  }
}
```

| Input Handles | Output Handles |
|---------------|----------------|
| `in` (text) | `out` (text, fan-out) |

Edges from `split-text` default to `outputMode: "each"`.

#### sticky-note (no connections)
Visual annotation. Not part of execution.

```json
{
  "type": "sticky-note",
  "data": {
    "label": "Note",
    "text": "This section handles the intro sequence",
    "color": "#2d2d44",
    "textColor": "#e2e8f0",
    "width": 200,
    "height": 150,
    "fontSize": "base",
    "bold": false,
    "italic": false,
    "alignment": "left"
  }
}
```

---

### Output Nodes

#### save-to-storage (0 credits)

```json
{
  "type": "save-to-storage",
  "data": {
    "label": "Save to Storage",
    "filename": "my-video",
    "format": "mp4",
    "quality": "standard",
    "fieldMappings": {}
  }
}
```

| Input Handles | Output Handles |
|---------------|----------------|
| `in` (any media) | `asset` (reference) |

#### webhook-output (0 credits)
Send results to an external URL.

```json
{
  "type": "webhook-output",
  "data": {
    "label": "Webhook Output",
    "url": "https://example.com/callback",
    "params": []
  }
}
```

| Input Handles | Output Handles |
|---------------|----------------|
| `in` (any) | none |

#### Social Post Nodes (1 credit each)

**instagram-post, tiktok-post, youtube-upload, linkedin-post, x-post, facebook-post**

```json
{
  "type": "instagram-post",
  "data": {
    "label": "Instagram Post",
    "platform": "instagram",
    "action": "feed-post",
    "caption": "Check out this amazing video! #ai #creative",
    "fieldMappings": {}
  }
}
```

| Input Handles | Output Handles |
|---------------|----------------|
| `in` (media) | none |

---

## Connection Rules

### Which nodes can connect to which

**Text outputs** (from: text-prompt, ai-writer, transcribe, image-to-text, combine-text, split-text, suno-lyrics, suno-style-boost) can connect to:
- Any node with `in` handle that accepts text (most AI nodes use connected text as prompt)
- text-to-speech `in` (for narration)
- generate-image `in` (as prompt)
- text-to-video `in` (as prompt)

**Image outputs** (from: generate-image, edit-image, image-to-image, upload-image, character, face, object, location) can connect to:
- image-to-video `startFrame` or `endFrame`
- image-to-image `image`
- edit-image `image`
- lip-sync `image`
- speech-to-video `image`
- motion-transfer `image`
- sora-storyboard `image`
- generate-image `in` (as reference image, for supported providers)

**Video outputs** (from: image-to-video, text-to-video, video-to-video, combine-videos, merge-video-audio, render-video, etc.) can connect to:
- combine-videos `in` (multiple videos accepted)
- merge-video-audio `in`
- add-captions `in`
- resize-video `in`
- trim-video `in`
- speed-ramp `in`
- loop-video `in`
- fade-video `in`
- extract-audio `in`
- after-effects `in`
- video-upscale `in`
- extend-video `in`
- motion-transfer `video`
- video-to-video `in`

**Audio outputs** (from: text-to-speech, generate-music, text-to-audio, extract-audio, mix-audio, suno-*, etc.) can connect to:
- merge-video-audio `in`
- mix-audio `in` (multiple audio accepted)
- image-to-video `audio`
- lip-sync `audio`
- speech-to-video `audio`
- transcribe `in`
- audio-isolation `in`
- voice-changer `in`
- dubbing `in`
- adjust-volume `in`

**Composition outputs** (from: video-composer, after-effects, motion-graphics, 3d-title, composite) must connect to:
- render-video `in`

---

## Common Workflow Patterns

### Pattern 1: Text to Image
```
text-prompt -> generate-image
```

### Pattern 2: Text to Video
```
text-prompt -> text-to-video
```

### Pattern 3: Image to Video with Narration
```
text-prompt -> generate-image -> image-to-video
text-prompt -> text-to-speech ─┐
                                └-> merge-video-audio
image-to-video ─────────────────┘
```

### Pattern 4: Multi-Scene Video
```
text-prompt -> generate-script -> [scene nodes] -> generate-image (per scene)
                                                 -> image-to-video (per scene)
                                                 -> combine-videos -> merge-video-audio
text-prompt -> generate-music ──────────────────────────────────────┘
```

### Pattern 5: Fan-out (Batch Generation)
```
list (3 items) -> generate-image (runs 3 times)
```

### Pattern 6: AI Composition
```
generate-image ─┐
generate-image ─┤
generate-image ─┼-> video-composer -> render-video
text-to-speech ─┤
generate-music ─┘
```

### Pattern 7: Social Publishing Pipeline
```
text-to-video -> resize-video (9:16) -> instagram-post
              -> resize-video (16:9) -> youtube-upload
              -> resize-video (9:16) -> tiktok-post
```

### Pattern 8: Talking Head Video
```
upload-image ──-> lip-sync -> merge-video-audio
text-prompt -> text-to-speech ─┘       │
generate-music ────────────────────────┘
```

### Pattern 9: Webhook-Triggered Automation
```
webhook-trigger -> ai-writer -> generate-image -> image-to-video -> webhook-output
```

### Pattern 10: Audio Production
```
text-prompt -> suno-generate -> suno-separate (vocals)
                             -> mix-audio -> merge-video-audio
text-to-audio (SFX) ────────┘
```

---

## Complete Example: Image Generation Workflow

```json
{
  "name": "Simple Image Generation",
  "nodes": [
    {
      "id": "node_1",
      "type": "text-prompt",
      "position": { "x": 100, "y": 200 },
      "data": {
        "label": "Prompt",
        "text": "A majestic dragon flying over a medieval castle at sunset, cinematic lighting, epic scale"
      }
    },
    {
      "id": "node_2",
      "type": "generate-image",
      "position": { "x": 450, "y": 200 },
      "data": {
        "label": "Generate Image",
        "prompt": "",
        "provider": "flux",
        "style": "cinematic",
        "aspectRatio": "16:9",
        "negativePrompt": "",
        "resolution": "2K",
        "fieldMappings": {}
      }
    }
  ],
  "edges": [
    {
      "id": "edge_1",
      "source": "node_1",
      "target": "node_2",
      "sourceHandle": "prompt",
      "targetHandle": "in"
    }
  ],
  "exportedAt": "2026-03-15T00:00:00.000Z",
  "version": "1.0"
}
```

## Complete Example: Video with Narration

```json
{
  "name": "Video with Voiceover",
  "nodes": [
    {
      "id": "node_1",
      "type": "text-prompt",
      "position": { "x": 100, "y": 100 },
      "data": {
        "label": "Scene Description",
        "text": "A serene Japanese garden with cherry blossoms falling gently"
      }
    },
    {
      "id": "node_2",
      "type": "text-prompt",
      "position": { "x": 100, "y": 350 },
      "data": {
        "label": "Narration Text",
        "text": "In the heart of Kyoto, where ancient traditions meet the whisper of spring, cherry blossoms dance their fleeting ballet."
      }
    },
    {
      "id": "node_3",
      "type": "generate-image",
      "position": { "x": 450, "y": 100 },
      "data": {
        "label": "Generate Image",
        "prompt": "",
        "provider": "nano-banana-pro",
        "style": "photorealistic",
        "aspectRatio": "16:9",
        "negativePrompt": "",
        "fieldMappings": {}
      }
    },
    {
      "id": "node_4",
      "type": "image-to-video",
      "position": { "x": 800, "y": 100 },
      "data": {
        "label": "Image to Video",
        "provider": "veo3",
        "duration": 8,
        "motion": "subtle",
        "cameraMotion": "static",
        "prompt": "Cherry blossoms gently falling, subtle breeze",
        "fieldMappings": {}
      }
    },
    {
      "id": "node_5",
      "type": "text-to-speech",
      "position": { "x": 450, "y": 350 },
      "data": {
        "label": "Narration",
        "provider": "elevenlabs-v3",
        "voiceId": "Charlotte",
        "voiceType": "premade",
        "voiceDisplayName": "Charlotte",
        "language": "en",
        "speed": 0.9,
        "stability": 0.6,
        "similarityBoost": 0.8,
        "style": 0,
        "languageCode": "",
        "textSource": "connected",
        "directText": "",
        "fieldMappings": {}
      }
    },
    {
      "id": "node_6",
      "type": "merge-video-audio",
      "position": { "x": 1150, "y": 200 },
      "data": {
        "label": "Merge Video & Audio",
        "audioType": "voiceover",
        "voiceoverVolume": 100,
        "backgroundVolume": 30,
        "keepOriginalAudio": false,
        "originalAudioVolume": 30,
        "originalAudioRole": "background",
        "trackSettings": {},
        "fieldMappings": {}
      }
    }
  ],
  "edges": [
    {
      "id": "edge_1",
      "source": "node_1",
      "target": "node_3",
      "sourceHandle": "prompt",
      "targetHandle": "in"
    },
    {
      "id": "edge_2",
      "source": "node_3",
      "target": "node_4",
      "sourceHandle": "image",
      "targetHandle": "startFrame"
    },
    {
      "id": "edge_3",
      "source": "node_2",
      "target": "node_5",
      "sourceHandle": "prompt",
      "targetHandle": "in"
    },
    {
      "id": "edge_4",
      "source": "node_4",
      "target": "node_6",
      "sourceHandle": "video",
      "targetHandle": "in"
    },
    {
      "id": "edge_5",
      "source": "node_5",
      "target": "node_6",
      "sourceHandle": "audio",
      "targetHandle": "in"
    }
  ],
  "exportedAt": "2026-03-15T00:00:00.000Z",
  "version": "1.0"
}
```

## Complete Example: Batch Image Generation with List

```json
{
  "name": "Batch Scene Generator",
  "nodes": [
    {
      "id": "node_1",
      "type": "list",
      "position": { "x": 100, "y": 200 },
      "data": {
        "label": "Scene Prompts",
        "items": "A sunrise over mountains with fog in the valleys\nA bustling cyberpunk city street at night with neon signs\nAn underwater coral reef teeming with colorful fish\nA cozy cabin interior with a fireplace during a snowstorm",
        "fieldMappings": {}
      }
    },
    {
      "id": "node_2",
      "type": "generate-image",
      "position": { "x": 500, "y": 200 },
      "data": {
        "label": "Generate Images",
        "prompt": "",
        "provider": "flux",
        "style": "cinematic",
        "aspectRatio": "16:9",
        "negativePrompt": "",
        "resolution": "2K",
        "fieldMappings": {}
      }
    }
  ],
  "edges": [
    {
      "id": "edge_1",
      "source": "node_1",
      "target": "node_2",
      "sourceHandle": "list",
      "targetHandle": "in",
      "data": { "outputMode": "each" }
    }
  ],
  "exportedAt": "2026-03-15T00:00:00.000Z",
  "version": "1.0"
}
```

## Important Notes

1. **fieldMappings** should be `{}` in generated workflows — they are populated at runtime.
2. **Prompt routing**: When a text node connects to an AI node via `in`, the text becomes the node's prompt automatically. You do NOT need to set the `prompt` field on the target node.
3. **Image routing**: When an image node connects to `image-to-video` via `startFrame`, it becomes the input frame. A second image on `endFrame` creates a start+end frame video (only supported by some providers).
4. **Multiple inputs**: Nodes like `combine-videos` and `mix-audio` accept multiple connections on their single `in` handle.
5. **Fan-out**: Connect a `list` or `split-text` node with edge `outputMode: "each"` to run downstream nodes once per item.
6. **Composition pipeline**: Composition nodes (video-composer, after-effects, etc.) output plans, not videos. They MUST connect to a `render-video` node to produce actual video.
7. **Node IDs** are remapped on import — use any convention (e.g., `node_1`, `node_2`).
8. **Position** values are in pixels. Typical spacing: 300-350px horizontal, 200-250px vertical.
